title: Triaspis argyrophylla
taxonomy: Triaspis argyrophylla is classified in the family Apocynaceae and the order Gentianales. This classification makes it a part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms. As a member of the Apocynaceae family, Triaspis argyrophylla is closely related to other plants in this family, such as the species of the genus Vinca. The genus Triaspis is often included in the subfamily Rauvolfioideae, which is a subgroup of the family Apocynaceae. The precise taxonomic classification of Triaspis argyrophylla may vary slightly depending on the source.
